state_metadata.title: Phaedrus
console_errors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (File not found)

findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.suggested_remediation: Review axe rule color-contrast in the linked raw axe JSON and rerun the replay command.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page has a simple, clear visual hierarchy with the site name 'PHAEDRUS' at the top, followed by navigation links (misty step, github, email), and a quote with attribution at the bottom. The reading order appears logical and meaningful.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Use a screen reader or inspect the DOM to verify that the reading order matches the visual presentation: header/title, navigation links, quote, and attribution in that sequence.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The visible content does not appear to rely solely on sensory characteristics like shape, size, visual location, orientation, or sound to convey information. Navigation links are labeled with text ('misty step', 'github', 'email').
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Review all instructions and content on the page to confirm no references like 'click the round button' or 'use the icon on the right' exist without additional text labels or context.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page layout appears simple and could work in both portrait and landscape orientations, but this cannot be definitively determined from a single static screenshot.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Test the page by rotating the device or resizing the browser window to both portrait and landscape orientations to verify content is not restricted to a single display orientation and remains functional in both.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page contains icons (building/briefcase, github logo, email envelope, and sun/theme toggle) that appear to be user interface components. The contrast of these icons against the light background needs measurement to verify 3:1 ratio.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Use a color contrast analyzer to measure the contrast ratio between the icon colors and the background. Check all interactive icons including the navigation icons and the sun/theme toggle in the top right to ensure they meet the 3:1 minimum contrast ratio.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The text appears properly spaced in the default view, but compliance requires testing whether the page remains functional when users apply custom text spacing via CSS overrides.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Apply the following CSS overrides and verify no content is cut off or overlaps: line-height to 1.5x font size, paragraph spacing to 2x font size, letter spacing to 0.12x font size, and word spacing to 0.16x font size.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page layout appears simple and could potentially scale well, but actual testing at 200% zoom is required to verify text remains readable and functionality is preserved.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Use browser zoom to increase text size to 200% and verify all text remains visible and readable without horizontal scrolling (in a 1280px wide viewport), and that no functionality is lost.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The 'PHAEDRUS' heading and all other visible text appear to be actual text rather than images of text. The icons are graphical elements serving as UI components, not text rendered as images.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Inspect the page source to confirm the 'PHAEDRUS' heading and all other text elements are implemented as actual text (HTML/CSS) rather than image files. Verify using browser developer tools or by attempting to select the text.

agentic_assessments.rationale: Cannot determine from the screenshot whether single-character keyboard shortcuts are implemented on this page, as this requires testing keyboard interaction.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Test the page by pressing individual character keys (letters, numbers, punctuation) to determine if any trigger actions. If single-character shortcuts exist, verify they can be turned off, remapped, or are only active when the relevant component has focus.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The screenshot shows a simple landing page with three navigation links ('misty step', 'github', 'email') but does not reveal whether multiple ways exist to locate content within the website. This requires inspection of the full site structure.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Navigate through the website to verify if there are at least two ways to locate pages (e.g., navigation menu, search function, sitemap, or related links). Check if this is a single-page site (which would be exempt) or a multi-page site requiring multiple navigation methods.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The visible page has a clear heading 'PHAEDRUS' and descriptive link labels ('misty step', 'github', 'email'). The quote attribution 'Tim Berners-Lee' is also clearly labeled.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Inspect the HTML to verify that 'PHAEDRUS' uses proper heading markup (h1-h6) and that all interactive elements have appropriate accessible names. Verify that the icon-based links have proper aria-labels or text alternatives.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The visible interface contains only simple links and a theme toggle button that appear to require single-pointer activation (clicks/taps) with no complex path-based or multipoint gestures visible.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Test all interactive elements to confirm they can be activated with single-pointer clicks/taps without requiring path-based gestures like swiping or dragging. Verify the sun/moon icon toggle works with simple clicks.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page contains clickable links and a theme toggle button, but the screenshot alone cannot determine whether activation occurs on down-event or up-event, or if there are mechanisms to abort or undo actions.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Test each interactive element (links and theme toggle) to verify that activation completes on the up-event (mouseup/touchend) rather than down-event, or that there is a mechanism to abort the action before completion. Verify users can move pointer away before release to cancel.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The visible text labels ('misty step', 'github', 'email') appear next to icons, but the screenshot cannot confirm whether the programmatic accessible names match or include these visible text labels.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Use browser developer tools or screen reader to inspect the accessible name of each link and button. Verify that the accessible name includes the visible text label (e.g., 'misty step', 'github', 'email') as part of the name.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page contains several clickable targets (three navigation links and a theme toggle), but precise measurements cannot be determined from the screenshot alone to verify they meet the 24x24 CSS pixel minimum.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Measure the click/tap target size of each interactive element using browser developer tools. Verify each target is at least 24x24 CSS pixels, or has sufficient spacing from other targets, or meets one of the allowed exceptions.

agentic_assessments.rationale: All visible text content appears to be in English with no obvious passages in other languages that would require lang attribute changes.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Inspect the HTML source to verify the page has a lang attribute set on the html element. Check if there are any text passages in languages different from the primary page language that should have lang attributes.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page contains focusable elements (links and theme toggle button), but the screenshot cannot demonstrate whether receiving focus triggers any unexpected context changes.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Use keyboard navigation to tab through all interactive elements. Verify that simply focusing on links, buttons, or form controls does not automatically trigger navigation, form submission, or other significant context changes without user activation.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The page shows navigation links and a theme toggle button, but I cannot determine from a static screenshot whether changing input settings causes unexpected context changes.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Test the theme toggle button (sun icon) and any other interactive elements to verify that changing their state does not automatically submit forms, significantly change page content, or cause unexpected navigation without user warning.

agentic_assessments.rationale: Only a single page view is visible, making it impossible to assess whether navigation mechanisms are repeated consistently across multiple pages.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Navigate to other pages in the website and verify that the navigation links ('misty step', 'github', 'email') appear in the same relative order and location across all pages.

agentic_assessments.rationale: While icons are visible for navigation items (briefcase, GitHub logo, email), I cannot assess from a single page whether these same components are identified consistently across multiple pages.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Check other pages in the website to confirm that identical functional components (like the GitHub link icon, email icon, and theme toggle) use the same icons, labels, and identification throughout the site.

agentic_assessments.rationale: No help mechanisms are visible on this page, and the criterion only applies if help mechanisms exist across multiple pages.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Verify whether any help mechanisms (contact links, help documentation, chatbots, etc.) exist on other pages of the site. If they do exist, confirm they appear in the same relative order across pages.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The static screenshot shows no visible status messages, but I cannot determine if status messages appear during interaction or if they would be properly announced to assistive technologies.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Interact with all page elements (especially the theme toggle) and use a screen reader to verify that any status messages (success confirmations, error messages, loading states) are programmatically announced using appropriate ARIA live regions or role='status'.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The images show focus states on interactive elements but do not reveal whether any additional content appears on hover or focus that would need to be dismissible, hoverable, or persistent.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Interact with all focusable elements (links, buttons) using both keyboard and mouse hover to check if any additional content (tooltips, popovers, etc.) appears. If so, verify it can be dismissed without moving focus, that pointer can move over the new content, and that it persists until dismissed or focus/hover is removed.

media.caption: Keyboard focus on: Toggle color mode
Keyboard focus moving through the page

agentic_assessments.rationale: The focus montage shows focus moving between elements (theme toggle, misty step, github, email links), but static images cannot confirm whether focus can freely exit all components or if any keyboard traps exist.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Use keyboard navigation (Tab, Shift+Tab, arrow keys, Escape) to navigate through all interactive elements on the page. Verify that focus can move forward and backward through all elements without getting trapped, and that any modal or custom components can be exited using standard keyboard commands.

media.caption: Keyboard focus on: Toggle color mode
Keyboard focus moving through the page

agentic_assessments.rationale: All focused elements visible in the images (theme toggle button, misty step link, github link) appear fully visible with clear focus indicators and no overlapping content obscuring them.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Navigate through all focusable elements using keyboard and verify that when each element receives focus, at least part of the focus indicator is visible and not hidden behind sticky headers, footers, modals, or other overlaying content.

media.caption: Keyboard focus on: Toggle color mode
Keyboard focus moving through the page

agentic_assessments.rationale: The focus sequence shown in the images progresses logically from right to left across the navigation links (theme toggle, misty step, github, email), which appears to follow a meaningful reading order for the page layout.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Use Tab key to navigate through all interactive elements and verify the focus order matches the visual layout and logical reading order. Confirm that focus moves through the theme toggle, then the three navigation links in sequence, without unexpected jumps.

media.caption: Keyboard focus on: Toggle color mode
Keyboard focus moving through the page

agentic_assessments.rationale: Each focused element in the images shows a clear black rectangular outline/border around it (visible on theme toggle button, misty step link, and github link), providing visible focus indication.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Navigate through all interactive elements using keyboard (Tab key) and verify that each element displays a clearly visible focus indicator when it receives focus. Check that the black border outline is consistently applied and has sufficient contrast against all backgrounds.

media.caption: Keyboard focus on: Toggle color mode
Keyboard focus moving through the page

agentic_assessments.rationale: The visible page appears to be a static landing page with a heading 'PHAEDRUS', navigation links (misty step, github, email), a sun icon, and a quote. No time limits or timed interactions are visible in the static screenshot.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Interact with all elements on the page to verify no time limits exist. Check if any forms, sessions, or timed processes are present that would require user action within a specific timeframe.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The static screenshot shows no obvious moving, blinking, or auto-updating content, but the sun icon in the top-right could potentially be animated or the page may have animations not visible in a still image.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Load the page in a browser and observe for at least 10 seconds to check if any content moves, blinks, scrolls automatically, or updates. Specifically check if the sun icon animates or if any transitions occur on page load or hover states.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The static screenshot shows no flashing content, but flashing can only be definitively assessed by observing the live page in motion.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Load the page and observe all content for at least 5 seconds, checking for any flashing elements. Use browser developer tools or automated flash detection tools to verify no content flashes more than three times per second.

agentic_assessments.rationale: The visible interface shows standard clickable links and a theme toggle icon with no indication of device motion or gesture-based functionality. All interactions appear to be through conventional pointer/keyboard input.
agentic_assessments.reviewer_guidance: Test the page on a mobile device with motion sensors. Verify that no functionality requires shaking, tilting, or moving the device. Confirm all features work with standard touch/click interactions only.
